hypotheses.title: Melatonin-Induced Diatoxanthin NPQ Buffer in Symbiodiniaceae
hypotheses.connection: Plant melatonin NPQ enhancement → Dd→Dt deepoxidation via DDE in Symbiodiniaceae → thermal bleaching delay
hypotheses.key_prediction: Melatonin pretreatment increases Dt/(Dd+Dt) ratio and NPQ under 32°C; Durusdinium has higher baseline melatonin than Cladocopium

hypotheses.title: Dark Priming — Nocturnal Melatonin Failure Under Nighttime Warming Triggers Bleaching
hypotheses.connection: Nocturnal melatonin peak → pre-dawn antioxidant buffer → nighttime warming depletes buffer → dawn vulnerability → bleaching
hypotheses.key_prediction: Pre-dawn melatonin falls ~19% per +3°C nighttime warming; SNAT/AANAT expression diverges between thermotolerant and thermosensitive genera

hypotheses.title: Melatonin-AFMK-AMK Cascade as GSH-Independent Thermal Antioxidant Buffer
hypotheses.connection: Melatonin→AFMK→AMK cascade → GSH-independent buffer during thermal GSH crash → delayed PSII damage
hypotheses.key_prediction: AFMK/AMK accumulate as GSH declines during thermal ramp; temporal crossover corresponds to Fv/Fm inflection

cross_model.consensus: HIGH — both identify stoichiometry vs kinetics error
